name: Smoked Chicken Hens
recipeInstructions:
STUFFING: Combine dressing with vegetables, bread, eggs, seasonings, and wine. Make half with smoked sausage and half with Italian sausage. Stuff the hens completely.
WATER PAN: Place smoker ingredients in the water pan.
SMOKING: Light charcoal and let it burn down. Add soaked wood chips on briquets. Place the water pan in the smoker and fill with water. Put the hens on the rack and smoke for about 5 hours.
